prompt: Add the RAG paper to my wiki: https://arxiv.org/abs/2005.11401 — this is the original Lewis et al. paper on retrieval-augmented generation. I need it for my RAG research notes. Authors are Patrick Lewis, Ethan Perez et al., published at NeurIPS 2020.

assertions.name: paper-file-in-correct-folder
assertions.description: A .md file was created in sources/paper/ with YYYY-MM-DD- prefix

assertions.name: authors-filled
assertions.description: authors field contains Lewis and Perez

assertions.name: log-updated
assertions.description: _meta/log.md contains an entry for this paper
